exampleSentences: Sáng nay em quyết định mặc chiếc áo sơ mi màu xanh.
Anh thường mặc quần jean khi đi chơi với bạn bè.
Chị không biết nên mặc váy hay quần cho buổi tiệc tối nay.

definitions.en: to wear or to put on (clothing)

example.en: I am wearing a new shirt today.
example.vi: Tôi mặc áo mới hôm nay.

exampleSentencesTranslated: This morning I decided to wear a blue shirt.
He usually likes to wear jeans when hanging out with friends.
She does not know whether to wear a dress or pants to the party tonight.
notes_md:
**mặc** = to *wear* clothes on your body. It’s used for clothing you put on and have on.

Use it with clothes: mặc áo, mặc quần, mặc váy, mặc đồng phục.  

It can also mean “ignore / don’t care about” in fixed phrases like *mặc kệ* (leave it, whatever).  
Opposite idea: **cởi** = take off (clothes).
